pricing_meta_desc: Simple and transparent pricing for OneForMind. Unlock your full potential today.
pricing_subtitle: Start free or unlock the full ecosystem. Choose the plan that matures with you.
pricing_free_desc: Perfect for beginners who want to start tracking habits and basic finances.
pricing_pro_desc: Unlock all tabs and premium features. Includes a 1-month trial, then recurs at a lower rate.
pricing_ai_desc: The future of productivity. Integrate AI into your daily workflow.
pricing_life_desc: The ultimate investment. Pay once, skip the unlock fee and recurring costs forever.
pricing_compare_subtitle: See exactly what you get in each plan.
pricing_trust_1_desc: Your data is encrypted and strictly private. We never sell your personal information.
pricing_trust_2_desc: Built with high-performance tech to ensure your workflow stays smooth and lag-free.
pricing_trust_3_desc: We ship new improvements and features every week based on user feedback.
pricing_faq_1_q: How does the Initial Unlock work?
pricing_faq_1_a: Your first payment unlocks all system tabs and includes a 1-month trial. Afterward, you pay a smaller monthly fee for maintenance and updates.
pricing_faq_2_q: Do you offer a money-back guarantee?
pricing_faq_2_a: Yes, we offer a 14-day full refund policy for our Pro and Lifetime plans if you're not satisfied.
pricing_bottom_cta_title: Ready to build a better life?
pricing_bottom_cta_desc: Join hundreds of users who use OneForMind to stay focused, organized, and productive.
